TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gaga'_sslalu', title = gaga'_sslalu', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gaga'_sslalu'} }

S.FORM: gaga' sslalu' gaga' na sslalu' Tayal hya' ga, syun naha' glaing lalu' na laqi' hru 'buzyan naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' tay suruw, gi yasa qu blaq slpuw musa' tay yatux. nanu' iy rima' mhuqil qu yaba' na laqi' qasa ru nanak yaya' niya' qu baqun na qlqalang naha' lga, mutuw naha' s'agal lalu' na yaya' naha' 'mubuy kmayal na, aw' ga atu' na mllpuw sa kinbkaysan naha' lga, s'agal naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' lawzi gi Tayal hya' ga yaqu mlikuy qu mutuw naha' lpgun iy mllpuw sa qutux kinbkaysan laha'.

gaga' sslalu' gaga' na sslalu' Tayal hya' ga, syun naha' glaing lalu' na laqi' hru 'buzyan naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' tay suruw, gi yasa qu blaq slpuw musa' tay yatux. nanu' iy rima' mhuqil qu yaba' na laqi' qasa ru nanak yaya' niya' qu baqun na qlqalang naha' lga, mutuw naha' s'agal lalu' na yaya' naha' 'mubuy kmayal na, aw' ga atu' na mllpuw sa kinbkaysan naha' lga, s'agal naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' lawzi gi Tayal hya' ga yaqu mlikuy qu mutuw naha' lpgun iy mllpuw sa qutux kinbkaysan laha'.
S.PHON: ɣaɣaʔ s~ɕs~ɕlaluʔ ɣaɣaʔ na s~ɕs~ɕlaluʔ tajal ħjaʔ ɣa, s~ɕjun naħaʔ ɣlaiŋ laluʔ na laqiʔ ħru ʔβuzjan naħaʔ laluʔ na jaβaʔ naħaʔ taj s~ɕuruw, ɣi jas~ɕa qu βlaq s~ɕlpuw mus~ɕaʔ taj jatux. nanuʔ ij rimaʔ mħuqil qu jaβaʔ na laqiʔ qas~ɕa ru nanak jajaʔ nijaʔ qu βaqun na qlqalaŋ naħaʔ lɣa, mutuw naħaʔ s~ɕʔaɣal laluʔ na jajaʔ naħaʔ ʔmuβuj kmajal na, awʔ ɣa atuʔ na mllpuw s~ɕa kinβkajs~ɕan naħaʔ lɣa, s~ɕʔaɣal naħaʔ laluʔ na jaβaʔ naħaʔ lawzi ɣi tajal ħjaʔ ɣa jaqu mlikuj qu mutuw naħaʔ lpɣun ij mllpuw s~ɕa qutux kinβkajs~ɕan laħaʔ.
